授業目的: 履修者は研究資料を要約する等の基本的な技能を学ぶ。
到達目標: 研究資料を調査し、個人研究で利用できる高等の研究方法を身につける。
授業方法:
Reading, discussion and exercises in English with
an emphasis on critical reflection.

第1回:
【Startup Week】
Face-to-face class
《90 minutes》
Course introduction: fundamentals of postgraduate research
第2回:
【Core Week ①】
Face-to-face class
《90 minutes》
Writing a book review
第3回:
【Core Week ②】
Face-to-face class
《90 minutes》
Features of academic writing (1): importance of structure
第4回:
【Core Week ③】
Face-to-face class
《90 minutes》
Features of academic writing (2): getting to the point
第5回:
【Core Week ④】
Face-to-face class
《90 minutes》
Features of academic writing (3): style matters
第6回:
【Core Week ⑤】
Face-to-face class
《90 minutes》
Features of academic writing (4): keeping it simple
第7回:
【Core Week ⑥】
Face-to-face class
《90 minutes》
Writing summaries (1): textbook samples
第8回:
【Core Week ⑦】
Face-to-face class
《90 minutes》
Writing summaries (2): English literature
第9回:
【Core Week ⑧】
Face-to-face class
《90 minutes》
Writing summaries (3): American literature
第10回:
【Flex Hours】
Face-to-face class
《90 minutes》
Writing summaries (4): teacher's choice
第11回:
【Core Week ⑨】
Face-to-face class
《90 minutes》
Loose ends (1): typical student mistakes
第12回:
【Core Week ⑩】
Face-to-face class
《90 minutes》
Loose ends (2): formatting and plagiarism
第13回:
【Core Week ⑪】
Face-to-face class
《90 minutes》
Loose ends (3): abstracts and proposals
第14回:
【Flex Hours】
Online class (Simultaneous two-way format)
《90 minutes》
Loose ends (4): AI and getting ahead
第15回:
【Core Week ⑫】
Face-to-face class
《90 minutes》
Closing: individual book review presentations
トピック.授業外学習2: Homework, usually an academic writing exercise, is given most weeks.

教科書/Required texts0: The course is taught through weekly handouts.
参考文献・資料/Reference books0:
Advice will be given on supplementary reading
during the course.
